meaning: 律勒欧[瑞典东北部港市](或译卢雷亚)
examples: I got a brief glimpse of the situation of Sweden's modern Sami when I visited subarctic town of lulea a few weeks ago.
In northern Sweden all air traffic was suspended, affecting the cities of Skelleftea, Lulea, Kiruna and Hemavan, the national aviation authority said.
The aims, tasks, fundamental equipment and research methods of diesel exhaust cleaning in the diesel engine laboratory of the University of Lulea are illustrated.
Accessed via a footbridge, the Cabin -- created by Cyren and Cyren -- is suspended from the surrounding pines on a steep bank, affording views of the Lulea River.
According to The Guardian, the company picked the site in Lulea, which sits about 62 miles below the Arctic Circle, because of its chilly climate as well as the easy access to renewable energy.
